Compliance Hearing Regarding Responses And Further Issues Regarding Request For Production Of Deposition Documents
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alan Harris of Harris & Rubel telephone number 323-962-3777 for Plaintiff Tanika Turley.
Eric De Wames of Messner Reeves LLP telephone number 310-909-7440 for Defendant Chipotle Services.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, Compliance Hearing Regarding Responses And Further Issues Regarding Request For Production Of Deposition Documents is denied in part and granted in part. The Court denies Mr. Harris request to provide names, addresses and phone numbers of Chipotle's prior employees (Form Interrogatory 209.2(a)). With respect to the deposition transcripts, the Court orders Chipotle Services to provide the last operative pleading by the plaintiffs in each of the cases where there is an allegation of violation of section 203 or 206 of the Labor Code. Mr. Harris is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Kelley De Young, CSR #6780. (302/HK)
